channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin Slides as Fed Says It Will 'Deliver Price Stability' Under Kevin Warsh
item.description: The first FOMC meeting under new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh produced the expected result, yet Bitcoin and other assets dipped.

item.title: Fed holds rates steady in first decision under new Chairman Kevin Warsh
item.description: The accompanying policy statement and updated economic projections, however, took a hawkish turn.

item.title: Kalshi adds software partner as it looks to boost prediction market surveillance
item.description: The collaboration comes as US state regulators and the CFTC battle over oversight of event-based contracts.

item.title: GLAAD Says AI Is Failing LGBTQ Users—And Warns the Risk Is Growing
item.description: GLAAD's report argues AI systems can amplify anti-LGBTQ bias, misinformation, discrimination, and privacy harms.

item.title: US lawmakers warn against presidential pardon for Sam Bankman-Fried
item.description: The former FTX CEO is currently serving a 25-year sentence after being found guilty on seven felony charges related to the misuse of customer funds.

item.title: Illinois Set to Begin Taxing Bitcoin, Crypto Transactions as Critics Slam 'Most Punitive' Tax
item.description: Critics say the Illinois transaction-level tax could deal severe consequences to the crypto industry and consumers in the state.

item.title: What Is Hyperliquid? The Decentralized Exchange With Its Own Blockchain
item.description: Hyperliquid’s decentralized exchange has rapidly grown to become one of the biggest projects in crypto. Here’s how it works.

item.title: Seeing the Full Picture: Why Pre- and Post-Designation Exposure Changes Everything in Sanctions Screening
item.description: Sanctions compliance in crypto isn’t just about knowing who’s on a list today. It’s about understanding the full arc of… The post Seeing the Full Picture: Why Pre- and Post-Designation Exposure Changes Everything in Sanctions Screening app…

item.title: Crypto industry aghast at Illinois' new tax on holding or transferring digital assets in state budget
item.description: The 0.2% tax on any business activity involving digital assets was added last-minute, and is unlikely to change, two people familiar with the matter said.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: The measure of a maturing market
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, trusted indexes turn fragmented digital assets into a mature market that big institutions can confidently invest in, writes Kirsten Wegner. Then, the division between traditional finance (TradFi) and cry…

item.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
item.description: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

item.title: Allbirds Stock Pumps Again as Sneaker Firm Completes AI Pivot, Rebranding to Smartbird
item.description: Allbirds, meet Smartbird: The shoe brand has completed its AI pivot, rebranding while hiring a new president and CEO to lead the charge.

item.title: Moody’s rolls out credit ratings on Solana in tokenized asset push
item.description: The ratings giant is embedding credit scores directly into blockchain-based securities, a move aimed at boosting institutional adoption.

item.title: Florida Man 'Bitcoin Rodney' Pleads Guilty Over $1.8 Billion HyperFund Crypto Fraud
item.description: A Miami-based man who went by the name “Bitcoin Rodney” pleaded guilty for his role in what prosecutors said was a massive global fraud.

item.title: Trace Finance raises $32M for cross-border stablecoin settlement expansion
item.description: The raise comes as stablecoin regulation advances globally and financial firms invest in infrastructure connecting blockchain payments with traditional banking systems.

item.title: BitGo stock surges on $50 million share buyback as value languishes 65% below IPO price
item.description: The buyback comes as newly public digital-asset firms face a tougher environment, with crypto markets lagging and investor attention shifting toward AI stocks.

item.title: Bitcoin price sets $64.5K week-to-date low as Strategy selling worries return
item.description: Bitcoin circled $65,000 after downside BTC price pressure into the FOMC meeting as analysis warned over the impact of Strategy potentially selling more BTC in the future.

item.title: 'Rapidly Evolving': Benchmark Analyst Bullish on Coinbase After Stocks, Options Moves
item.description: Benchmark-StoneX reiterated a $270 price target for COIN—60% higher than Coinbase’s current share price—following an array of product announcements.

item.title: Crypto’s security nightmare won’t be solved by ordinary audits
item.description: Without an update to the current auditing infrastructure, the crypto space will likely continue to suffer significant losses, explains Beyer.

item.title: Ready USDC card halts non-EEA service after issuer change, users report
item.description: Users reported losing access to Ready’s USDC card outside the EEA after a card provider change triggered rapid deactivation notices.

item.title: Mexican billionaire with 70% of his investment portfolio in bitcoin says it's better than real estate
item.description: Ricardo Salinas Pliego, whose net worth is estimated at roughly $5 billion, is a bitcoin maximalist who told his wife to mortgage her house to buy bitcoin.

item.title: Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting could be more about communication than rates
item.description: While monetary policy is expected to remain unchanged, markets are focused on whether the new chair begins reshaping how the U.S. central bank communicates.

item.title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails
item.description: CoinMENA will use Standard Chartered to strengthen fiat payment rails in the UAE, while Revolut reportedly secured central bank licenses ahead of a planned local launch.

item.title: Onchain, in court: What happened in crypto legal news this week
item.description: The Polymarket insider trading case and a retrial of Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm are expected to move forward in late 2026 while former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky awaits a response to his motion to vacate his sentence.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) drops 3.1%, leading index lower
item.description: Cardano (ADA), down 2.8%, was also among the underperformers.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Senators Introduce Bipartisan Resolution Opposing SBF Pardon
item.description: Senators Gallego and Lummis want the chamber on record that the FTX fraudster should get no clemency under any circumstances.

item.title: Inveniam to acquire Mantra after turbulent year marked by OM crash
item.description: Inveniam announced plans to acquire Mantra, a blockchain project that spent the past year recovering from the collapse of its OM token and prolonged market pressure.

item.title: A new Bittensor proposal would turn validators into something like fund managers
item.description: Root Reborn would have TAO validators pick which subnets to back and reinvest yield into, rather than constantly selling subnet tokens to pay stakers. It is a code proposal in review, not a live change.

item.title: Morning Minute: Coinbase Pushes to Become 'Everything Exchange' With Stocks, Perps, and AI
item.description: The wall between crypto and TradFi continues to break down as Coinbase ushers in non-crypto products.

item.title: SpaceX's $2.6 trillion market cap nearly double that of bitcoin
item.description: Eight days after its IPO, SpaceX has surged past $2.5 trillion to become the world's sixth-largest company. And market watchers say it is pulling the risk capital crypto wants.

item.title: Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption
item.description: Chain of Thought is our new expert-hosted webinar series, taking you behind the scenes of real investigations, emerging typologies and… The post Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: Bitcoin's June downturn leaves $8.6 billion in options out of the money
item.description: Only 20% of June 26 options open interest is currently in the money, while bitcoin's 12% monthly decline leaves most bullish positions underwater.

item.title: Fifth-generation Kanoo group member is moving a $6 trillion trade market onto blockchain rails
item.description: Abdulla Kanoo says his ARP Digital firm is building settlement infrastructure for the growing flow of trade between emerging economies, a market that could reach $32 trillion by 2030.

item.title: Three Fed signals that could make bitcoin pop
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 17, 2026

item.title: China pays closer attention to stablecoins as cross-border role expands
item.description: A senior PBOC official called for closer monitoring, stronger regulation and international coordination as stablecoins gain importance in global payments.

item.title: Bitcoin is setting up 'meaningful floors' in $60K–$70K range: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin’s $60,000–$70,000 cost-basis cluster hints at a bottom, but a bearish daily flag keeps BTC exposed to a deeper selloff toward $50,000.

item.title: Uniswap Jumps Double Digits as Standard Chartered Eyes $100 UNI by 2030
item.description: The DeFi token is up 20% in a day, with a Standard Chartered note and Uniswap's tokenized-stock launch fueling fresh demand.

item.title: UNI token surges while rest of crypto market looks to Fed's Warsh for guidance
item.description: The Federal Open Markets Committee is set to announce the first interest-rate decision under Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, who then faces questions from journalists.

item.title: Forget retail traders: The real multi-trillion-dollar crypto future is building infrastructure for machines
item.description: While legacy banks keep corporate money idled in slow regional accounts, a new protocol allows software systems to settle multi-currency trade instantly.

item.title: Bitcoin trader warns of 'bearish reaction' to FOMC with $64K now essential
item.description: Bitcoin approached important near-term support on new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's first FOMC day with a $55,000 BTC price target still on the table.

item.title: Hyperliquid's $10B open interest coincides with growth in equity-linked markets: Talos
item.description: Hyperliquid’s $10 billion open interest milestone shows growing demand for onchain equities and commodities trading with 24/7 accessibility, according to Talos.

item.title: House, Senate Strike Deal on Housing Bill With CBDC Ban Through 2030
item.description: A bicameral deal on the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act revives a provision barring the Fed from issuing a digital dollar until 2030.

item.title: BitGo courts crypto firms awaiting MiCA approval amid Binance licensing concerns
item.description: BitGo launches a MiCA-compliant crypto infrastructure platform in Europe as exchanges face pressure to meet July 1 licensing rules across the EU.

item.title: Ethereum's Biggest Upgrade Since The Merge Nears Ethereum $ETH developers have entered the final testing phase for Glamsterdam, a major network upgrade expected later this year, per CoinDesk. Core developer Parithosh Jayanthi described it as the lar - x.com

item.title: BitGo offers Europe’s crypto firms a MiCA-compliance lifeline as license deadline looms
item.description: BaFin-regulated BitGo says its Crypto-as-a-Service platform can help eligible crypto players across Europe with an alternative way to navigate MiCA.

item.title: Forget the price charts. Here's how bitcoin and S&P 500 look like when adjusted for the money printer
item.description: Valuations shaped by M2 money supply growth paint reveal concerning trends for risk assets.

item.title: Congress reaches deal on housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
item.description: The US could soon temporarily ban a central bank digital currency, as House and Senate leaders came to a deal on the 21st Century Road to Housing Act.

item.title: Strategy’s STRC falls to $91 as investors flinch at latest BTC buying
item.description: “It appears traders are seeing the latest BTC acquisition as an unsustainable path for STRC,” said 10x Research’s Markus Thielen.

item.title: Crypto PAC's $12 million Senate candidate, Barry Moore, wins Alabama GOP primary
item.description: The Trump loyalist drew more crypto dollars than any candidate so far in this year's midterms, and the result marks a big win for the industry's political arm.

item.title: Live markets: Fed holds rates steady, but makes a hawkish turn as Warsh takes over
item.description: Bitcoin's Sharpe ratio hit a level that has marked every cycle low since 2015, but in each case it preceded months of basing rather than an immediate rebound.

item.title: Illinois governor approves crypto transaction tax despite industry uproar
item.description: “There is effectively no comparable state financial transaction tax on stocks, bonds or derivatives anywhere in the country,” said a16z general counsel Miles Jennings.

item.title: Hyperliquid open interest surges 32% in week: Is $80 HYPE next?
item.description: Despite mixed HYPE derivatives market signals, Hyperliquid’s explosive TradFi perpetual growth makes a push toward $80 increasingly realistic.

item.title: 🚨NEW: Trump-endorsed and crypto-backed @RepBarryMoore has won the GOP primary runoff for Alabama’s open Senate seat, defeating @JaredHudson_AL. Fairshake spent more than $12 million in the race and provided the following statement after the vi - x.com

item.title: Senators urge Treasury to ensure state authority in GENIUS application
item.description: A bipartisan group of US senators told the Treasury that its application of stablecoin laws should be done in a way that “preserves and promotes State participation.”

item.title: This is one of the most anti-crypto laws in the U.S. It taxes the exchange, transfer, or storage of digital assets—you buy BTC, you pay a tax; you hold your BTC on Coinbase, you pay a tax; and so on. There is effectively no comparable state financial transaction t - x.com

item.title: Alibaba Is Building Qwen-Robot: The Operating System for the Robot Economy
item.description: The Chinese company is doubling down on its "embodied AI" bet.

item.title: Illinois Governor Pritzker just signed the most punitive digital asset tax in the country into law. This will create an unprecedented tax regime that disproportionately burdens Illinois residents for simply using digital assets and will drive innovation and builders out - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBHYkNNenNyS0tRNDA3OVF6T3ZHQTQ0MUlKSjJ5V2RRenc2cTVUUUhoUzhySTBmRVhnSFpxSjdlTnZ6RjRGZ2I3Tzh6RDQ1bEgwNG1Hd3dBb1hCem9ZNGZCRGNSYWRxZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Illinois Governor Pritzker j…

item.title: We started as a place to buy Bitcoin, now we power your entire financial life. Here’s everything we announced today ↓ → Tokenized Stocks → Pre-IPO Perps → Stock options → Crypto options → Perpetual-style equity indices → Crypto derivatives, back in Am - x.com

item.title: Crypto Exchange Binance Will Be Rejected for EU Regulatory License: Reuters
item.description: Binance said it believes it is compliant as a regulatory deadline in the European Union nears—and a report says it's likely to lose access.
